texto: I do not want chemistry to degenerate into a religion
autor: I do not want the chemist to believe in the existence of atoms as the Christian believes in the existence of Christ in the communion wafer.
explicacao: Citação de I do not want the chemist to believe in the existence of atoms as the Christian believes in the existence of Christ in the communion wafer. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I do not want chemistry to degenerate into a religion” articula reflexao, marcellin-berthelot, chemistry em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
